title: Survey of school business professionals 2025
body: "Areas covered in the survey include:   characteristics qualifications, experience and intentions involvement in strategic decision-making views on procurement use of Department for Education school resource management tools, and the impact of those tools on their work   The survey may be of interest to:   school business professionals school leaders governing bodies other school business profession stakeholder groups and representative bodies  "

taxons.title: Recruiting and managing non-teaching school staff
